title: Update phone number to 8429145707 in footer

requirements.summary: Update the footer contact phone number to '+91-8429145707' and corresponding tel: href link
acceptanceCriteria: The footer contact section displays '+91-8429145707' as the phone number.
Any tel: anchor href in the footer is updated to 'tel:+918429145707'.
No other phone number instances elsewhere in the footer are left as the old number.

file_operations.description: Locate the phone number display in the footer contact section (corresponding to XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/p[1]) and update the displayed phone number text to '+91-8429145707'. Also update any associated tel: anchor href attribute to 'tel:+918429145707' to enable click-to-call functionality. Ensure no other phone number references in the footer are left with the old value.
